titlestmt.titleproper: Lucinda Cawley political and commemorative textiles collection8433

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Lucinda Cawley political and commemorative textiles collection
did.abstract: Approximately 100 commemorative textiles, buttons, photographs and other ephemera relating to United States presidential campaigns, United States military, World's Fairs, as well as other events from the late 19th century through the early 21st century.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Lucinda Cawley co-authored "Saved for the People of Pennsylvania: Quilts from the Collection of the State Museum of Pennsylvania" with Lorrane Ezbiansky and Denise Nordberg. She built a collection of antique fraktur-inscribed quilts and used old census records to research the individuals whose names appeared on the quilts. These quilts are now part of the Lucinda Cawley Collection at the International Quilt Study Center and Museum at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln. Cornell's collection consists of Lucinda's other passion of collecting political and commemorative textiles.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Approximately 100 commemorative textiles, buttons, photographs and other ephemera relating to United States presidential campaigns, United States military, World's Fairs, as well as other events from the late 19th century through the early 21st century.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Similar political textiles appear in the Susan H, Douglas Political Americana Collection, #2214 and can be viewed as part of an on-line exhibit.

list.head: Books - cataloged individually in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
list.item: Collins, Herbert Ridgeway Threads of History: Americana Recorded on Cloth 1775 to the Present, 1979 (many of the textiles in this collection are similar to those found in this book)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Lucinda Cawley Political and Commemorative Textiles Collection, #8433. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cut of fabric. His portrait with a map of Africa.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cut of fabric. His portrait with American flags and the slogan "Yes we can."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cut of fabric. His portrait with the phrase "Akwaaba."

did.unittitle: Ronald Regan and George Bush Handkerchief

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Shift dress made from cotton scarf fabric.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Uses the chemical signs for gold and water.

did.unittitle: Dwight D. Eisenhower Toile in Tan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cut of fabric with motifs from Eisenhower's life.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Woven Jacquard; from the Textile Department at Georgia Tech

did.unittitle: Advertisement of presidential candidate Grover Cleveland for "The Bazaar" shop in Brockport, NY
Reproduction Roosevelt and Gardner - Repeal Prohibition 1932 Campaign Coaster

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Beer Coaster from the FDR Library

did.unittitle: Flag of the Allies World War I Handkerchief
Thule Air Base, Greenland Pillow Cover
United States Army - Camp Bowie Texas Pillow Cover
The Democratic Party Handkerchief (up to Harry Truman) (x2)
The Democratic Party Handkerchief (up to Lyndon Johnson)
Souvenir of Washington D.C. Handkerchief (with Franklin Delano Roosevelt)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Founder of the National Woman's Christian Temperance Union

did.unittitle: The Sesquicentennial Philadelphia - 150 Years of Independence Flag
Flags of North American and Europe Quilt

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Label reads "Tobacco Premiums Flag Quilt." Includes flags of European countries prior to World War I

did.unittitle: Justice and Peace - George Washington Fabric Swatch
Justice and Peace - George Washington Reproduction Fabric Swatch
Greetings from the Mexican Boarder Handkerchief
Tobacco Flannel - "America" and flags of Central and South America
Souvenir of the World's Fair in Chicago Scarf
Cross Stitch Pattern for an eagle and "E Pluribus Unum"
Fabric Book "A was an Archer" - children's book - Dean's Rag Book London
Photographic Print of Civil War Era Woman
Tobacco Flannel in the shape of a "rug" with (Native American?) image of a swastika
Tobacco Flannel in the shape of a "rug" with Yale University Logo

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the "Rising Sun Collection" and the Little Sisters Quilt Collection" at the Smithsonian
